**Analyzing the strike announcement**

I need to produce JSON according to the "image input" specifications. The document is in Italian and seems to announce a public transport strike. The title mentions that metro lines A and C are closed while line B is active. It notes the publication date as 11/11/2022 and an update on 25/01/2023. The body confirms it's an ongoing strike with details about the closures and possible reductions in service, so it reflects the current situation from 2022-2023.
